features.name: unpacked struct with rand members
features.description: Code should include an unpacked structure definition with rand-qualified members of different integral types

features.name: class with rand unpacked struct variable
features.description: Code should include a class containing a rand-qualified unpacked structure variable

features.name: inside constraint on unpacked struct member
features.description: Code should include a constraint block using the inside operator to constrain an unpacked structure member to a set of values
